name: @ijfw/install
description: One-command installer for IJFW -- the AI efficiency layer.

scripts.build: esbuild src/install.js src/uninstall.js src/ijfw.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outdir=dist --format=esm --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && chmod +x dist/install.js dist/uninstall.js dist/ijfw.js

author: Sean Donahoe
